overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player moves from a covered sidewalk, crosses a street, and walks through an underpass featuring a holographic dragon and a massive humanoid statue.

notable_agents.action: walking ahead in the same direction along the sidewalk

massive skyscraper with distinctive red structural accents and vertical neon lighting
small shops and vending machines along the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered sidewalk beneath an elevated highway in a futuristic city. Neon billboards line the left side while a massive red-accented skyscraper dominates the right. Sparse pedestrian traffic moves ahead in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection crosswalk leading to underpass

events.description: turns right to cross the street toward the underpass entrance
enters the darker covered underpass structure

dark tunnel entrance with illuminated edges leading under the highway

segments.scene_description: Turning right to cross the street at a crosswalk, moving from the covered walkway into open space. The tall red-accented building shifts to the left as the camera turns, approaching the dark entrance of an underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian underpass with green neon floor lighting

events.description: large holographic dragon statue becomes visible ahead in the underpass

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit underpass with green illuminated flooring toward the distant light

entered.detail: low concrete ceiling with embedded lighting fixtures creating a tunnel effect
pedestrian walkway with distinctive green neon lighting along the edges

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow enclosed underpass with a low concrete ceiling and green neon-lit floor. The environment is artificially lit and sheltered from weather, with the tall red building fading from view behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass plaza with monumental holographic installations

events.description: massive humanoid statue with outstretched arms comes into view at the end of the underpass

agents.ego_description: approaching the large humanoid statue at the end of the underpass while passing the holographic dragon

entered.detail: large translucent white dragon hologram with neon blue base lighting
giant bronze-colored statue of a figure with arms outstretched against the city skyline
dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers visible through the end of the underpass

segments.scene_description: Approaching the end of the underpass where a massive holographic dragon appears on the right before being passed. The scene opens to reveal a gigantic humanoid statue with outstretched arms silhouetted against a dense futuristic city skyline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered urban sidewalk into a grand, open plaza dominated by futuristic monuments. It begins beneath an elevated highway, moving past neon billboards and a towering red-accented skyscraper while following a few pedestrians. As the camera turns right to cross the street, the red building shifts to the left and the open air gives way to the dark, enclosed entrance of an underpass. The scene then transitions into a narrow corridor with a low concrete ceiling and a glowing green neon floor, shielding the view of the city outside. Finally, the camera passes a massive holographic dragon on the right as the underpass opens up to reveal a gigantic humanoid statue with outstretched arms silhouetted against a dense skyline.
